text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky looks over the list of runners set to
appear in the upcoming Mainichi Okan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka is a powerful force in the racing
world. She's amassed a large number of fans with
her unreal speed, earning her the nickname
"Otherworldly Front-Runner."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hmm, that could be problematic. A contest of speed against Suzuka is not something to look forward to.
choice_data_list: She's a formidable opponent, that's for sure.
She's a formidable opponent, that's for sure.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You said it. Can you imagine me, like...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Wooow, I've been waiting for this more than
anything. ♪ I wonder who'll win! ☆"

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Pleeease... There's no way I'd be as carefree
about it like everybody else.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka and Seiun Sky are as alike as they
are different... Everyone's been pumped to see
them face off.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well! I guess there was a time when I wanted to run against Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Her otherwordly speed versus my brains...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's time to find out who'll come out on
top!
